body.raw:
{
  "url": "https://pdfco-test-files.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/pdf-search-and-replace/sample-agreement-template-signature-page-1.pdf",
  "file": "<path to a local file>",
  "searchstring": "[CLIENT-NAME]",
  "replacestring": "John Doe",
  "searchstrings": [
    {
      "value": "<Error: Too many levels of nesting to fake this schema>"
    },
    {
      "value": "<Error: Too many levels of nesting to fake this schema>"
    }
  ],

description.content: Convert URL into PDF. This method will process any JavaScript which the webpage triggers when it loads. For example if the the webpage triggers a JavaScript popup window then that will be included in the conversion process. There is no option to disable JavaScript on the supplied HTML page.

  "url": "https://wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Contact_us",
  "margins": "5mm",

}

description.content: Merge PDF from two or more PDF, DOC, XLS, images, even ZIP with documents and images into a new PDF. This Merge 2 endpoint is similar to [Merge PDF](/api-reference/merge/pdf) but it also supports `zip`, `doc`, `docx`, `xls`, `xlsx`, `rtf`, `txt`, `png`, `jpg` files as source. This Merge2 endpoint also consumes more credits than [Merge PDF](/api-reference/merge/pdf) because of the internal conversions.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Add password and security limitations to PDF

body.raw:
{
  "url": "https://pdfco-test-files.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/pdf-merge/sample1.pdf",
  "ownerpassword": "12345",
  "userpassword": "54321",
  "encryptionalgorithm": "AES_128bit",
  "allowaccessibilitysupport": "<boolean>",
  "allowassemblydocument": "<boolean>",
  "allowprintdocument": false,
  "allowfillforms": false,
  "allowmodifydocument": false,
  "allowcontentextraction": false,
  "allowmodifyannotations": false,
  "printquality": "LowResolution",
  "name": "output-protected.pdf",
  "expiration": 60,
  "async": false,
  "profiles": "<string>",
  "httpusername": "<string>",
  "httppassword": "<string>"
}

description.content:
PDF.co Web API — programmatic PDF and document automation: AI invoice parsing, document parsing, PDF conversion (to/from PDF, Excel, CSV, JSON, XML, HTML, images), OCR, merging, splitting, compression, barcodes, e-signature workflows, and more. Authenticated via the x-api-key header.

Contact Support:
 Name: PDF.co Support
 Email: support@pdf.co
